name: @aikdna/kdna-react
description: React components and hooks for building KDNA-integrated web applications — file dropzone, load-plan gate, password unlock, license activation, asset inspector, creator wizard, and export.

scripts.ci: npm test && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --json

@aikdna/kdna-web-client.description: Optional until the coordinated web packages are published; components can use endpoint props directly.

@aikdna/kdna-web-server.description: Required if you use the default endpoint wiring. Omit only if you provide custom endpoint props.
